label: Welcome email sent to client
description: Automatically sent when the client record is created

label: Client Info Cognito form completed by client
description: Auto-detected via Cognito API when the form is submitted

label: Personnel information returned by client
description: Auto-detected when client submits the personnel collection form

label: Client WhatsApp group created
description: CAM creates and adds all relevant parties to the group

label: NDA sent to client
description: Automatically sent from the app via QuicklySign

label: NDA signed by client
description: Auto-detected via QuicklySign API when client signs

label: SLA sent to client
description: Automatically sent from the app via QuicklySign

label: SLA signed by client
description: Auto-detected via QuicklySign API when client signs

label: Channel emails sent
description: One per assigned channel — automatically sent by the app

label: Channel mandates received
description: One per assigned channel — CAM confirms receipt manually

label: SharePoint folder structure created
description: Auto-detected when CAM clicks Create SharePoint Folders in the app

label: Control file: Links File
description: CAM confirms the Links File has been created

label: Control file: Product Management File
description: CAM confirms the Product Management File has been created

label: Control file: Ranging File
description: CAM confirms the Ranging File has been created

label: Control file: Promo File
description: CAM confirms the Promo File has been created

label: Control file: Custom Store Tags
description: CAM confirms the Custom Store Tags file has been created

label: ARIA Lite: Add-in set up (if applicable)
description: For ARIA Lite clients only — CAM confirms add-in is configured

label: ARIA Lite: Add-in shared with client (if applicable)
description: For ARIA Lite clients only — CAM confirms add-in has been shared

label: OJ Power BI accounts created (if required)
description: If client requires PBI reporting — CAM confirms accounts are set up

label: Training completed with client
description: CAM confirms onboarding training session has taken place

label: Report workshop completed with client
description: CAM confirms the reporting workshop session has taken place

label: Monthly meetings scheduled
description: CAM confirms recurring monthly meetings have been set up
